messages.message:
Error: Cannot access variable before it is declared

`stopListening` is accessed before it is declared, which prevents the earlier access from updating when this value changes over time.

/Users/lhommeduchili/hacking/resonance/src/components/p2p/useListener.ts:39:18
  37 |     audio.muted = true; // MUST be muted so the browser doesn't play raw audio bypassing WebAudio API
  38 |     audioElementRef.current = audio;
> 39 |     return () => stopListening();
     |                  ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ `stopListening` accessed before it is declared
  40 |   }, []);
  41 |
  42 |   const createUpstreamConnection = (

  472 |

> 475 |     if (socketRef.current && socketRef.current.connected) {

> 512 |     }
      | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
